title: Dungeons Dirt
description: Makes dirt look like the dirt from Minecraft Dungeons, with rotations.
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

**Dungeons Dirt** makes dirt look like the dirt from Minecraft Dungeons. Grass, mycelium, podzol and dirt blocks have block rotations with dirt having a pebble variation that also rotates. Path blocks and coarse dirt both use a rocky dirt texture.


![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7925a01ec4becf39f08a04c4d89b50801d96fd0.png)
